data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of basic availability (M-F 9-5), which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the availability of time slots during the specified hours. The successful bookings do not inherently confirm that the service is available during the required hours, indicating a gap in the evidence needed to satisfy this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the availability of time slots from M-F 9-5.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
